title: Artificial intelligence and semiconductors plummet amid fears of overspending
summary: Technology and chip stocks fall sharply due to doubts about the profitability of AI investments, Samsung loses 7% despite surging profits, and SK Hynix seeks 29 billion amid sector meltdown.

title: Oil surges to $80 after attacks in Iran and Russian diesel ban
summary: Brent crude jumped to $80 due to the conflict between the US and Iran and Russia's suspension of diesel exports, as experts debate whether an oversupply is looming.

title: Global stock markets fall sharply due to geopolitical escalation in the Middle East
summary: Wall Street, the DAX, and the FTSE record losses of more than 1% amid fears of an open war between the US and Iran and the rally in oil, with the Dow Jones losing up to 850 points.

title: Trump ends truce with Iran, US and regime exchange attacks and revoke oil exemptions
summary: The US president announced the end of the agreement with Iran, leading to mutual attacks and the withdrawal of exemptions for Iranian oil sales, raising tensions in the Gulf.

title: SpaceX trades below its IPO price but analysts see 56% potential
summary: Despite falling below its initial listing price, analysts set a target price of up to $800 for SpaceX, anticipating a 56% appreciation.

title: Ibex 35 falls 2.73% dragged by oil and Trump's threat to Spain
summary: The Spanish benchmark loses the 19,100-point level in a black session, with Repsol as the only rising stock thanks to the rally in crude.

title: Fed shows growing concern over inflation and supports new rate hikes
summary: The Fed minutes reveal that most members are in favor of continuing monetary tightening to control persistent inflation.

title: IMF cuts global growth forecast to 3% for 2026 due to Iran war
summary: The conflict in Iran and the rise in oil prices lead the IMF to revise down its forecasts, warning that the global economy will not recover until 2027.

title: UniCredit increases its stake in Commerzbank to 48% in its assault on the German bank
summary: The Italian bank strengthens its position in the German bank Commerzbank, raising its stake to 48% and putting pressure on the management.

title: Iberdrola begins installation of its largest solar park in Oregon and HSBC rates it as winner of the decade
summary: The Spanish utility begins construction of the Oregon Trail Solar project in the US, while an HSBC report places it among the companies with the highest appreciation potential.

title: Bitcoin recovers $60,000 after Warsh's statements
summary: The cryptocurrency surpasses the $60,000 barrier after comments from the former Fed official, boosting optimism in the crypto market.

title: Bank of America warns that the US now has two economies
summary: The bank points to a widening gap between sectors that depend on stimulus and those that do not, complicating monetary policy.

title: Japan's borrowing costs hit 30-year highs amid debt fears
summary: The yield on the 10-year Japanese bond exceeds levels not seen in three decades, reflecting concerns about the country's fiscal sustainability.

title: European Commission sues Spain before the ECJ for failing to meet minimum capital requirements
summary: Brussels goes to the EU Court of Justice, considering that Spain has not correctly applied the rules on the required minimum own funds.

title: UK regulator FCA accuses a lawyer of insider trading in Seraphine sale
summary: A lawyer faces charges for leaking confidential information related to the sale of children's fashion brand Seraphine.

title: FCA warns lenders want to leave the fox guarding the henhouse in car financing
summary: The UK financial regulator criticizes the stance of banks that seek to avoid changes in auto lending regulation.

title: CNMV to include artificial intelligence in the new Good Governance Code for listed companies
summary: The Spanish stock market regulator will update its corporate governance code to include guidelines on the use of artificial intelligence in companies.

title: Artificial intelligence already generates half of European stock market returns, according to a study
summary: A report reveals that companies integrating AI into their processes are obtaining half of the profits of the European stock market.

title: Indonesian stock market receives second rating downgrade warning
summary: The main rating agency warns of the risk of a credit downgrade for Indonesia due to economic and political uncertainty.

title: Bank of Spain authorizes Crossmint to operate stablecoin payments
summary: Spanish fintech Crossmint receives approval from the supervisor to operate with stablecoins and offer cryptocurrency payment services.
